reviews.comment:
Siempre, una muy buena atención. La única contra que suele tener es que hay cola en casi todas las ocasiones que cargo, pero es esperable si sos bien recibido y todo funciona siempre.

(Translated by Google)
The service is always excellent. The only downside is that there's usually a queue when I go there, but that's to be expected if you're treated well and everything always works smoothly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnd3BMNnhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre mucha gente y atienden con pocas ganas. Muy lentos hacen el trabajo y no hacen 2 cosas al mismo tiempo ( limpiar vidrios mientras llenan el tanque) por mas que la cola es larga, no les importa y siempre tienen 1 o 2 de los 4 surtidores cerrados.

(Translated by Google)
It's always crowded and the service is unenthusiastic. They're very slow, they do their job, and they can't do two things at once (like cleaning windshields while filling the tank), even though the line is long. They don't care, and they always have one or two of the four pumps closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3LXNxeFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
La mayoría de las veces hay que hacer fila y esperar. Al estar ubicado sobre una avenida, es incómodo para esperar...y la espera suele ser larga (más en vísperas de feriados)

(Translated by Google)
Most of the time you have to queue and wait. Being located on an avenue makes waiting uncomfortable...and the wait is usually long (especially on the eve of holidays).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb2VtRDd3RRAB
